message: Guy was seated in the center, sandwiched between the baseball team officials from the NETS.
So that means he wasn't hiding of his own will, but was actually under house arrest at the team's facilities?
Well, how should I put it?
We were having a positive discussion.
? I heard rumors that you were going to sign with another team next season, Guy?
I wasn't considering signing with another team. It's just that we had a bit of a disagreement this time.
But, everyone was awful. They were saying I'm a murderer, right?
Yeah, that's right, it's a terrible story. That's why we brought him here today for this press conference.
But thanks to that, Guy managed to return to New York, right?
What was your actual relationship with Cindy? Since it's a good opportunity, could you tell us about the BAM article?
This isn't that kind of press conference, is it?
Stop it! Stop! The press conference is over.
We still need to hear more.
That's right, that's right! We haven't heard anything yet!
Everyone, quiet down! Anyway, Guy will be active with the Nets next season, so please support him.
Yeah. I wish he had come back a bit sooner.
Is that what it's about? The team didn't want to let Guy go, so they basically held him captive?
Seems like it. Seriously, that raccoon old man Garrison.
By the way, there's a party at the manager's place?
Yeah, they're throwing a welcome back party for Guy at the manager's place in Trump Tower.
I see, the manager really is rich. Besides the house in Boston, he has one in NY too.
And it's at Trump Tower, huh.
Of course! Hehehe, a great detective.
It's a great chance for O'Brien to catch the murderer, after all.
The culprit behind Eva and Cindy's murders. Get ready, you know?
Seriously, the Boss is such a worrywart. Ugh!
But, you know, there was an incident at the Boston party where they caused trouble.
I hope it doesn't turn out that way.
